solo.list: Access to subjects of all classes;Tasks with artificial intelligence;Webinars with students;Olympiads from AISchool;No ads;Access to audio tasks by languages;Tasks for preparing for exams;Tasks from previous years' state olympiads;Access to extracurricular subjects;Help with entering state universities

group.desc: Special tools for teachers and class management

plans.title: Subscription plans
plans.desc: All group plans come with a 50% discount!

about.title: Importance of the subscription
about.desc: We provide all the necessary learning materials absolutely free, but artificial intelligence (AI) is (unfortunately) not free. To support our servers, we are introducing a paid subscription. In addition to the AI ​​implementation, both students and teachers will have access to a variety of convenient features and additional materials to support their learning. A class subscription can be created by the homeroom teacher in their personal profile. Subscriptions require at least 75% participation in the selected class.

group.title: Class subscription
group.desc: A class subscription includes all the benefits of a single subscription, but also provides helpful features for teachers. This functionality will only be available to classes that subscribe.
group.discount: The price of the group subscription is lower by 50%!
